race.description: Daintys Daughter 3yo Fillies Country Classic Ms Pace (Listed Classic)
race.comment: MANUKA BAY NZ (9) saluted in a much weaker race over 2130m at Gloucester Park last time out to bring up her hat-trick, scoring by 3 metres. Ready to add this big race to her CV. SHIMMERING NZ (1) could only manage fifth last start over 2130m at Gloucester Park, beaten 10 metres. Drawn well so watch for a much better run. A PRECIOUS GEM (5) found one better last start over 2185m at this track, beaten 1.3 metres. Looms as a serious challenger. SUGA NZ (6) is looking for black-type success after suffering a defeat last time out a much weaker race over 2185m at this track, arriving 3.5 metres behind the winner. Looms as a serious challenger.
